description: Machine-readable representation of UK Skilled Worker Visa eligibility criteria - Enhanced with Phase 1 & Phase 2 improvements

root.description: UK Skilled Worker Visa Eligibility Assessment

check_switching_eligibility.question: If applicant is switching from Student visa in the UK, have they completed their course (or at least 24 months of a PhD)?
check_switching_eligibility.help_text: Students must complete their course before switching. PhD students can switch after 24 months. Not applicable if applying from outside UK or switching from other visa types.

has_approved_employer.question: Does the applicant have a job offer from a UK employer approved by the Home Office?
has_approved_employer.help_text: Approved employers are on the register of licensed sponsors

has_certificate_of_sponsorship.question: Does the applicant have a Certificate of Sponsorship (CoS) from their employer?
has_certificate_of_sponsorship.help_text: The CoS is an electronic record with a reference number, valid for 3 months

check_genuine_vacancy.question: Is this a genuine vacancy that meets credibility requirements?
check_genuine_vacancy.help_text: The Home Office may refuse applications where the job appears to be created solely to facilitate visa sponsorship, or where the role lacks genuine business need. This is a subjective assessment by caseworkers.

criteria.genuine_business_need: Role must fill an actual business need, not created solely for sponsorship
criteria.credible_job_description: Duties must be substantive, specific, and match the SOC code
criteria.appropriate_for_business_size: Role must be proportionate to the sponsor's size and operations
criteria.not_nepotistic: Position should not appear to primarily benefit a friend/relative
criteria.sustainable: Employer must demonstrate ability to sustain the role long-term
criteria.appropriate_vacancy_advertising: Evidence that position was genuinely advertised (if required)

check_genuine_vacancy.disclaimer: This is a discretionary check based on the totality of circumstances. The Home Office may request additional evidence or interviews. Even if all measurable criteria are met (salary, skill level), applications can be refused on credibility grounds.
common_red_flags: Small business suddenly creating high-level role
Role overlaps significantly with existing staff
Applicant is family member or close associate of business owner
Business financials don't support the salary level
Role appears tailored to specific individual rather than business need

check_genuine_employment.question: Is this genuine direct employment by the sponsor (not third-party contracting)?
check_genuine_employment.help_text: Sponsor must be the genuine employer. Cannot use visa to supply workers to third parties for routine roles.

check_guaranteed_salary_structure.question: Is the salary guaranteed basic gross pay with valid contract structure?
check_guaranteed_salary_structure.help_text: Only guaranteed basic gross salary counts. Excludes bonuses, commission, allowances, equity. Contract must guarantee minimum hours. Calculation capped at 48 hours/week.

check_part_time_eligibility.question: If part-time: does actual gross annual salary meet the general threshold (even if hourly rate pro-rates correctly)?
check_part_time_eligibility.help_text: Part-time workers: Going rate can be pro-rated by hours worked, BUT the general salary threshold (£41,700 standard, £33,400 reduced routes, £29,000 transitional) CANNOT be pro-rated. Actual gross annual salary must still meet the applicable absolute floor.

criteria.applies_to: Part-time workers with guaranteed hours less than standard full-time (typically <37.5 hours/week)
must_meet_both: Pro-rated going rate for the occupation (hourly wage comparison)
Applicable general threshold as actual gross annual salary (£41,700 standard, £33,400 reduced, £29,000 transitional)
criteria.common_failure_scenario: High hourly rate but low annual hours results in actual gross salary below general threshold

check_transitional_eligibility.question: Did the applicant receive their first Certificate of Sponsorship for Skilled Worker visa before 4 April 2024?
check_transitional_eligibility.help_text: Transitional arrangements apply lower salary thresholds and going rates for existing visa holders extending or changing jobs

check_transitional_salary.question: Does the salary meet transitional requirements?
check_transitional_salary.help_text: For transitional cases: salary must be at least £29,000 per year AND meet the 25th percentile (lower) going rate for the occupation

check_occupation_eligibility.question: Is the job eligible for Skilled Worker visa?
check_occupation_eligibility.help_text: Job must have a 4-digit SOC 2020 occupation code and be on the eligible occupations list

check_salary_list_or_shortage.question: Is the job on the Immigration Salary List OR Temporary Shortage List?
check_salary_list_or_shortage.help_text: Medium skilled jobs can only apply if on one of these lists

determine_salary_threshold.description: Determine which salary rules apply based on job type
determine_salary_threshold.routing_logic: If occupation is in healthcare/education list, go to healthcare_education_salary, else go to standard

check_healthcare_education_salary.question: Does the salary meet healthcare/education requirements?
check_healthcare_education_salary.help_text: Salary must be at least £25,000 AND meet the national pay scale going rate for the specific job

criteria.going_rate_source: National pay scales (NHS bands or education pay scales)

check_care_worker_registration.question: If applicant is a care worker (6135) or senior care worker (6136) in England, is employer registered with Care Quality Commission?
check_care_worker_registration.help_text: Only applies to care workers in England

check_standard_salary_requirement.question: Does the salary meet the standard requirements?
check_standard_salary_requirement.help_text: Salary must be at least £41,700 per year OR the going rate for the job, whichever is HIGHER

check_reduced_salary_eligibility.question: Is the applicant eligible for reduced salary requirements?
check_reduced_salary_eligibility.help_text: Multiple paths can qualify for paying between 70-90% of going rate. If ANY path is satisfied, applicant proceeds to English language check.
check_reduced_salary_eligibility.evaluation_logic: Check each path in any order. If applicant meets criteria for ANY path, outcome is 'eligible_via_any_path'. If NONE are met, outcome is 'not_eligible'.

paths.description: Job is on the Immigration Salary List
criteria: Job occupation code is on the Immigration Salary List
Salary is at least £33,400 per year
Salary meets the FULL (100%) standard going rate for the job (NOT 80% discount)
paths.important_note: Being on the ISL provides a lower general threshold (£33,400 instead of £41,700) BUT does NOT provide a discount on the going rate. You must still meet the full (100%) going rate for your occupation. The 80% going rate discount from the old Shortage Occupation List no longer applies (changed April 2024).
paths.clarification: ISL lowers the general minimum floor but does NOT reduce the occupation-specific going rate requirement. Only New Entrants get going rate discounts (70-90% depending on path).

paths.description: Under 26, recent graduate, or in professional training
criteria: Salary is at least £33,400 per year
Salary is at least 70% of the standard going rate for the job

AND one of: Under 26 on application date, OR currently on/recently on Student visa (bachelor's or above), OR currently on/recently on Graduate visa, OR working towards UK regulated profession qualification, OR working towards full registration/chartered status in sponsored job
paths.time_limit: Maximum 4 years total stay including Graduate visa
paths.time_limit_enforcement: Total time on Graduate visa + New Entrant Skilled Worker visa cannot exceed 4 years. Application must be denied if granting the requested visa duration would cause total to exceed 4 years.
paths.time_tracking_note: Implementation must track: (1) Time already spent on Graduate visa, (2) Time already spent on Skilled Worker visa as New Entrant, (3) Visa duration being requested. Sum must not exceed 4 years.

criteria: Salary is at least £33,400 per year
Salary is at least 80% of the standard going rate for the job
Has UK PhD or equivalent overseas doctorate in STEM field (verified by Ecctis if overseas)
PhD is relevant to the job being sponsored for
Job is on the list of occupations that qualify for PhD salary discount
Salary is at least £37,500 per year
Salary is at least 90% of the standard going rate for the job
Has UK PhD or equivalent overseas doctorate in non-STEM field (verified by Ecctis if overseas)
PhD is relevant to the job being sponsored for
Job is on the list of occupations that qualify for PhD salary discount

paths.description: Postdoctoral position in science or higher education
criteria: Salary is at least £33,400 per year (calculated at 70% of going rate)
Salary is at least 70% of the standard going rate for the job
Job is a postdoctoral position

occupation_descriptions.2119: Natural and social science professionals not elsewhere classified

paths.time_limit: Maximum 4 years total stay including Graduate visa
paths.time_limit_enforcement: Total time on Graduate visa + postdoctoral Skilled Worker visa cannot exceed 4 years. Application must be denied if granting the requested visa duration would cause total to exceed 4 years.

check_english_language.question: Does the applicant meet English language requirements?
check_english_language.help_text: Must prove English to at least B2 CEFR level unless exempt

paths.requirement: Passed English language assessment accepted by regulated professional body

paths.description: Previously proved English in successful visa application
paths.requirement: Proved English knowledge in previous UK visa application

qualifications: Scottish Higher or Advanced Higher in English

paths.description: Degree from UK institution taught in English
paths.requirement: Degree-level qualification taught in English, awarded by UK institution

paths.description: Degree from overseas institution taught in English
paths.requirement: Degree taught in English, verified as equivalent to UK bachelor's or higher by Ecctis
Pass SELT from approved provider at B2 level or above

check_financial_requirement.question: Does the applicant meet financial requirements?

criteria.recency_requirement: Day 28 must be within 31 days of application
exemptions: Been in UK with valid visa for at least 12 months
Employer confirms they can cover costs (via 'sponsor certifies maintenance' on CoS)

ELIGIBLE.description: Applicant meets all criteria for Skilled Worker visa
next_steps: Apply online within 3 months of Certificate of Sponsorship date
Pay application fee (£769-£1,751 depending on circumstances)
Prove identity and attend appointment if required

INELIGIBLE_no_approved_employer.reason: No job offer from Home Office approved employer
INELIGIBLE_no_approved_employer.guidance: Employer must apply for sponsor licence if not already approved

INELIGIBLE_no_cos.reason: No Certificate of Sponsorship from employer
INELIGIBLE_no_cos.guidance: Employer must provide CoS after checking eligibility

INELIGIBLE_occupation_not_eligible.reason: Job occupation code not eligible for Skilled Worker visa
INELIGIBLE_occupation_not_eligible.guidance: Check if eligible for another UK work visa type

INELIGIBLE_medium_skilled_not_on_list.reason: Medium skilled job not on Immigration Salary List or Temporary Shortage List
INELIGIBLE_medium_skilled_not_on_list.guidance: Medium skilled jobs must be on one of these lists to qualify

INELIGIBLE_salary_too_low.reason: Salary does not meet minimum requirements for this visa
INELIGIBLE_salary_too_low.guidance: Check if eligible for reduced salary requirements or another visa type

INELIGIBLE_cqc_not_registered.reason: Employer not registered with Care Quality Commission (required for care workers in England)
INELIGIBLE_cqc_not_registered.guidance: Employer must be CQC registered for occupation codes 6135 and 6136 in England

INELIGIBLE_english_language.reason: Does not meet English language requirements
INELIGIBLE_english_language.guidance: Must prove English to B2 CEFR level or meet exemption criteria

INELIGIBLE_insufficient_funds.reason: Insufficient funds to support self in UK
INELIGIBLE_insufficient_funds.guidance: Must have £1,270 for 28 days or employer must certify maintenance

INELIGIBLE_student_not_completed.reason: Student visa holder has not completed course (or 24 months of PhD)
INELIGIBLE_student_not_completed.guidance: Must complete course before switching to Skilled Worker visa from inside UK. PhD students can switch after 24 months. Alternatively, leave UK and apply for entry clearance from overseas.

INELIGIBLE_third_party_working.reason: Not genuine direct employment - sponsor is contracting worker to third party
INELIGIBLE_third_party_working.guidance: Skilled Worker visa requires genuine employment by the sponsor. Cannot be used to supply workers to third parties for routine roles. Sponsor must be the genuine employer with direct control over worker's duties.

INELIGIBLE_salary_structure_invalid.reason: Salary structure does not meet requirements (e.g., includes ineligible allowances, bonuses, equity; zero-hours contract; hours exceed 48/week cap for calculation)
INELIGIBLE_salary_structure_invalid.guidance: Only guaranteed basic gross pay counts toward threshold. Excludes: bonuses, commission, allowances, equity, overtime. Must be on PAYE employment contract with guaranteed minimum hours. Salary calculation capped at 48 hours per week. Restructure compensation as basic salary.

INELIGIBLE_part_time_below_threshold.reason: Part-time salary: hourly rate may be adequate (pro-rated going rate) but actual gross annual salary is below the general threshold
INELIGIBLE_part_time_below_threshold.guidance: Part-time workers can pro-rate the going rate for their occupation BUT must still meet the applicable general threshold as actual annual salary: £41,700 (standard), £33,400 (reduced routes), or £29,000 (transitional). Either increase hourly rate or increase guaranteed hours to reach the required annual salary.

INELIGIBLE_not_genuine_vacancy.reason: Home Office has concerns that this is not a genuine vacancy or role lacks credibility
INELIGIBLE_not_genuine_vacancy.guidance: The caseworker has determined the role does not represent a genuine business need or appears created primarily to facilitate visa sponsorship. This can include roles that are disproportionate to business size, vague job descriptions, apparent nepotism, or lack of financial sustainability. This is a discretionary refusal. Sponsor should review business case, provide more evidence of genuine need, ensure job description is specific and matches SOC code, and demonstrate financial capacity.

salary_calculation_rules.calculation_note: Salary calculated as: min(contracted_hours, 48) × hourly_rate × 52 weeks, or guaranteed annual salary if specified

part_time_rules.explanation: Part-time workers can pro-rate the going rate for their occupation based on hours worked. However, the general salary thresholds (£41,700 standard, £33,400 reduced, £29,000 transitional) CANNOT be pro-rated. The actual gross annual salary must still meet the applicable general threshold.
part_time_rules.example: Architect earning £30/hour for 22.5 hours/week = £35,100 annual. Hourly rate meets pro-rated going rate, but annual salary is below £41,700 general threshold (standard route) = REFUSED

time_limits.enforcement: Sum of (Graduate visa time + New Entrant/Postdoc Skilled Worker time) must not exceed 4 years
time_limits.note: Time on Student visa (except Graduate) does not count toward the cap

transitional_arrangements.applies_to: Applicants who received first CoS before 4 April 2024

salary_calculation.rule: Salary must meet the HIGHER of: (1) threshold minimum, (2) going rate for occupation, (3) percentage of going rate if using reduced route
salary_calculation.going_rate_source: Government published tables by occupation code (50th percentile for standard, 25th percentile for transitional)
salary_calculation.excludes: Bonuses, commission, allowances (housing, car, living), stock options, equity, overtime pay, unguaranteed variable pay
salary_calculation.hourly_calculation: Capped at 48 hours per week: min(contracted_hours, 48) × hourly_rate × 52 weeks
salary_calculation.contract_requirements: Must be PAYE employment with guaranteed minimum hours. Zero-hours contracts not accepted.

part_time_workers.going_rate: Can be pro-rated based on hours worked (hourly wage comparison)
part_time_workers.general_threshold: CANNOT be pro-rated - actual gross annual salary must meet full threshold
part_time_workers.common_failure: High hourly rate meets pro-rated going rate, but low guaranteed hours result in annual salary below general threshold
part_time_workers.example: £30/hour × 22.5 hours/week × 52 weeks = £35,100 annual. Hourly rate adequate but annual salary below £41,700 standard threshold.

special_cases.healthcare_education: Use national pay scales (NHS bands or education pay scales)
special_cases.transitional: Use £29,000 threshold and 25th percentile going rates for pre-April 2024 visa holders
special_cases.extending_visa: Different thresholds may apply - see extend visa guidance
special_cases.updating_visa: Different thresholds may apply - see update visa guidance

immigration_salary_list.rule: Jobs on the Immigration Salary List (ISL) benefit from lower general threshold but NO discount on going rate
immigration_salary_list.going_rate_requirement: Must meet 100% (full) going rate for the occupation
immigration_salary_list.no_discount: ISL does NOT provide 80% going rate discount (this ended April 2024 with old Shortage Occupation List)
immigration_salary_list.going_rate_discount_eligibility: Only New Entrants, PhD holders, and Postdocs can get going rate discounts (70-90%)
immigration_salary_list.benefits: Lower visa application fee, lower general threshold
immigration_salary_list.common_misconception: Sponsors incorrectly assume ISL allows 80% of going rate (old SOL rules). ISL only lowers the general threshold floor.

minimum_wage.rule: Job must pay at least national minimum wage and follow UK working hours rules

time_limits.new_entrant_routes: Maximum 4 years total: Graduate visa time + New Entrant Skilled Worker time cannot exceed 4 years
time_limits.postdoctoral_route: Maximum 4 years total: Graduate visa time + Postdoctoral Skilled Worker time cannot exceed 4 years
time_limits.enforcement: System must track accumulated time and deny application if granting requested duration would exceed cap
time_limits.calculation: Sum all time on: (1) Graduate visa, (2) Skilled Worker as New Entrant, (3) Skilled Worker as Postdoctoral position, (4) Global Business Mobility as Graduate Trainee. Total must not exceed 4 years.
time_limits.general: Visa can be extended repeatedly if requirements still met (no cap for standard route)
time_limits.settlement: Can apply for indefinite leave to remain after 5 years

genuine_vacancy.rule: Job must represent a genuine business need, not created solely to facilitate visa sponsorship
genuine_vacancy.discretionary: This is a subjective assessment by caseworkers based on totality of circumstances
indicators_of_credibility: Role fills a genuine business need proportionate to company size
Specific, detailed job description matching SOC code
Position not primarily benefiting family/friends of business owner
red_flags: Small business creating disproportionate high-level role
Role overlaps significantly with existing staff
Applicant is family member or close associate of owner
Business financials don't support salary level
Job description tailored to individual rather than business need
genuine_vacancy.consequence: Application can be refused even if all measurable criteria (salary, skill level, English) are met. Additional evidence or interview may be requested.

genuine_employment.rule: Sponsor must be genuine direct employer, not supplying workers to third parties
indicators_of_genuine_employment: Worker reports directly to sponsor managers
Role fills a genuine business need of the sponsor
Sponsor has direct day-to-day control over worker's duties
Worker is integrated into sponsor's organization
Role is not primarily filling a client/third-party vacancy
genuine_employment.prohibited: Using visa to supply contract workers to third parties for routine roles (acting as recruitment agency)
genuine_employment.consequence: Application refused or sponsorship withdrawn if third-party working detected

student_switching.rule: Students switching from inside UK must have completed their course
student_switching.exceptions: PhD students can switch after 24 months even if not yet completed
student_switching.alternative: Student can leave UK and apply for entry clearance from overseas if course not completed
student_switching.consequence: In-country application refused if course not completed (unless PhD 24+ months)

transitional_arrangements.applies_to: Applicants whose first Skilled Worker CoS was issued before 4 April 2024
benefits: Lower going rates: 25th percentile instead of 50th percentile
transitional_arrangements.scope: Extensions and job changes only (not new entrants to the route)
